entry.title: GT-AC5300 Koolshare 官改安装Entware
entry.content:
1. 首先插入ex3/ex4 usb disk一枚。
  2. 创建对应的Entware文件夹:
    mkdir /mnt/sda1/entware
  3. 连接路由器的ssh，输入以下命令：
    cat << EOF > /tmp/script_usbmount.tmp
ln -nsf /mnt/sda1/entware /tmp/opt
EOF
nvram set script_usbmount="`cat /tmp/script_usbmount.tmp`"

cat << EOF > /tmp/script_usbumount.tmp
EOF
nvram set script_usbumount=”cat /tmp/script_usbumount.tmp“

nvram commit
4. 重启路由器
5. 重启之后查看文件夹/tmp/opt是否存在以及是否可以打开。
6. 在ssh里面执行下面的命令：

wget -O - http://bin.entware.net/aarch64-k3.10/installer/generic.sh | sh
  1. 完成后输入opkg update检查是否有有效输出。
    END

Reference:
https://koolshare.cn/thread-154594-1-1.html
https://github.com/Entware/Entware/wiki/Install-on-Asus-stock-firmware

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment

entry.title: Insecure/STARTTLS/SSLTLS 测试邮箱搭建
entry.content:
1. 安装Hmailserver(https://www.hmailserver.com/), 需要提前安装.netformwork；
  2. 按照提示设置密码；
  3. 使用hMailServer Administrator连接到hmailserver, 密码是安装的时候设置的；
  4. 首先添加一个domain；
  5. 接着添加几个账号，设置好密码；
  6. 生成测试证书，可以去https://myssl.com/create_test_cert.html
  7. 可以看到以下三个文件：
    cert.pem对应服务器证书
    full_chain.pem对应CA证书
    private.key对应私钥
  8. 回到hMailServer Administrator, 打开Settings->Advanced->SSL certificates；
  9. 点Add 新加一个证书；
  10. 给证书起一个名字，Certificate file 对应cert.pem，Private key file对应private.key；
  11. 然后保存即可；
  12. 切换到Settings->Advanced->TCP ports;
  13. 这里可以按照需要进行设置相应的端口:
    一般对应如下:
    SMTP: 25(Insecure)/587(STARTTLS)/465(SSLTLS).
    POP3: 110
    IMAP:143
  14. 对于测试部分，这里只是用到了SMTP的发送功能，收件功能没有特殊要求。
  15. 选中0.0.0.0/587/SMTP, Connection security 选择 STARTTLS(Required), SSL Certificate选择步骤10里面的证书， 然后保存，这样就配置好了STARTTLS;
  16. 同样，选中0.0.0.0/465/SMTP(如果没有参考PORT 25来配置一个就好)，Connection security 选择SSL/TLS, SSL Certificate选择步骤10里面的证书然后保存，这样就配置好了SSL/TLS；
  17. 到此，邮件服务器就已经配置完成；
  18. 使用邮件客户端进行测试，可以用thunderbird 或者foxmail;
  19. 分别指定不同的SMTP发送服务器设置；
  20. 确保可以收到邮件；
  21. 检查hMailSever的log，可以看到对应的加密log:
    `”TCPIP” 916 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.844” “TCP - 10.245.17.234 connected to 10.245.47.36:588.”
    “DEBUG” 916 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.844” “TCP connection started for session 163”
    “SMTPD” 916 163 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “10.245.17.234” “SENT: 220 DCG-L3-C2–09-L ESMTP”
    “SMTPD” 6528 163 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “10.245.17.234” “RECEIVED: EHLO BMC”
    “SMTPD” 6528 163 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “10.245.17.234” “SENT: 250-DCG-L3-C2–09-L[nl]250-SIZE 20480000[nl]250-STARTTLS[nl]250-AUTH LOGIN PLAIN[nl]250 HELP”
    “SMTPD” 916 163 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “10.245.17.234” “RECEIVED: STARTTLS”
    “SMTPD” 916 163 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “10.245.17.234” “SENT: 220 Ready to start TLS”
    “DEBUG” 4348 “2021-02-18 13:44:22.860” “Performing SSL/TLS handshake for session 163. Verify certificate: False”
    “TCPIP” 4348 “2021-02-18 13:44:23.391” “TCPConnection - TLS/SSL handshake completed. Session Id: 163, Remote IP: 10.245.17.234, Version: TLSv1.2, Cipher: ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384, Bits: 256”

“TCPIP” 2300 “2021-02-18 13:36:26.688” “TCP - 10.245.17.234 connected to 10.245.47.36:466.”
“DEBUG” 2300 “2021-02-18 13:36:26.688” “TCP connection started for session 90”
“DEBUG” 2300 “2021-02-18 13:36:26.688” “Performing SSL/TLS handshake for session 90. Verify certificate: False”
“TCPIP” 2300 “2021-02-18 13:36:26.969” “TCPConnection - TLS/SSL handshake completed. Session Id: 90, Remote IP: 10.245.17.234, Version: TLSv1.2, Cipher: ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384, Bits: 256”`

entry.title: 解决Could not create SSL/TLS secure channel
entry.content:
System.Net.WebException: The request was aborted: Could not create
SSL/TLS secure channel.

在我们的案例中，我们在使用软件供应商，因此我们无权修改.NET代码。除非有更改，否则.NET 4显然不会使用TLS v 1.2。

我们的解决方法是将SchUseStrongCrypto密钥添加到注册表中。您可以将以下代码复制/粘贴到扩展名为.reg的文本文件中并执行它。它充当了我们解决该问题的”补丁”

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00

[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Microsoft.NETFramework\v4.0.30319]
“SchUseStrongCrypto”=dword:00000001

[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft.NETFramework\v4.0.30319]
“SchUseStrongCrypto”=dword:00000001

Reference:
https://www.codenong.com/2859790/

entry.title: 执行iptraf-ng 提示Warning: unable to tag this process
